name: ICG Silver & Gold Ltd.
description: ICG Silver & Gold Ltd. is a newly listed Canadian mineral exploration company that commenced trading on the Canadian Securities Exchange on March 31, 2026, following the acquisition of the Tuscarora District from American Pacific Mining Corp. The Tuscarora District is a silver-gold epithermal system covering approximately 10,000 acres on the Carlin Trend in northern Nevada, about one hour northwest of Elko. ICG is a well-funded early-stage explorer with approximately C$6.2 million raised, planning a Phase 1 drill program at Tuscarora commencing in summer 2026.
